steps.note: +job/delete <#> permanently removes an active job with no archive copy. Fires the job:deleted hook. Only superusers may delete — admin/wizard staff are denied.

steps.cmd: +request Lag Spike=The server lags every hour on the hour.
steps.label: player submits a job

steps.note: +archive/purge <#> permanently deletes one archived job. +archive/purgeall CONFIRM nukes all archived jobs. Both require superuser. CONFIRM must be typed exactly (uppercase) as a safety guard.

steps.cmd: +request Old Bug=This was filed ages ago.
steps.label: submit another job to close and archive
close it so it lands in the archive
verify job #2 is in the archive
submit one more to demonstrate purgeall

steps.note: +job/renumber resequences all active jobs from 1 in current sort order. Useful after deletes leave gaps. Requires superuser.

steps.label: submit job (will get number 4 after gaps)
resequence all active job numbers from 1
confirm clean sequential numbering starting at 1

steps.note: +job/theme shows all active token values with their source layer (game override, config file, or built-in default). +job/theme/set <token>=<value> persists an override to the DB. +job/theme/reset clears all in-game overrides.

steps.label: change bracket color to bright red
see the updated chrome on a real view

steps.expect: >JOBS: In-game theme overrides cleared. Restored to config file / defaults.
